channel.title: Secrets on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Secrets on Validated Patterns

item.title: Introducing "Bootstrap" Secrets
item.description: Validated Patterns now includes the idea of "bootstrap" secrets that will be injected directly into your cluster during the secrets loading process.

item.title: More Secrets Options Now Available with Validated Patterns
item.description: Validated Patterns now supports alternatives to both HashiCorp Vault and the External Secrets Operator
